title: CD Projekt RED trusts that The Witcher 4 will restore confidence after Cyberpunk 2077
summary: The Polish studio considers its next installment key to overcoming the disastrous 2020 launch.

title: Microsoft and Halo Studios confirm that Halo: Campaign Evolved will not require PS Plus for local co-op
summary: After the controversy, the company clarified that players on PS5 will be able to enjoy the split-screen mode without a subscription.

title: Richard Garriott plans to reclaim the rights to Ultima from EA in 2027
summary: The creator of the saga will use a legal clause to reclaim the intellectual property of the franchise.

title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in plane crash
summary: One of the five founding brothers of the company died when the aircraft crashed in France.

title: ArenaNet announces Mistbound, a Guild Wars card game
summary: The company reveals a CCG set in the series' universe in addition to the anticipated Guild Wars 3.

title: Sony removes PC from its strategic report and bets on artificial intelligence
summary: The Japanese company has changed its business focus, prioritizing AI over the PC market.

title: The Adventures of Elliot, an example of Square Enix's acclaimed HD-2D style
summary: The game receives praise for its art and already has a complete achievement guide.

title: Bobby Prince, composer of DOOM and Duke Nukem, dies
summary: The legendary MIDI musician, responsible for the soundtracks of id Software classics, has died at age 81.

title: Microsoft cancels five promising games in development
summary: The company has halted several unannounced projects, according to a report.

title: Layoffs at Luna Abyss team just one month after its launch
summary: The developers of the bullet hell FPS have been fired, joining the wave of layoffs in the industry.

title: Stellaris celebrates its tenth anniversary with discounts and free weekend
summary: The space strategy game offers 70% off and free access during the weekend.

title: Epic Games plans to improve launcher speed and add reviews to the store
summary: The gaming platform seeks to optimize user experience and interaction with ratings.

title: Global video game revenues surpass $200 billion in 2025
summary: According to a report, the global market continues to grow led by PC, reaching an all-time high.

title: Diablo 4: Lord of Hatred receives rating in Taiwan for Switch 2
summary: Blizzard's expansion has been evaluated by the Taiwanese authority, suggesting its release on the new console.

title: My Hero Academia: All's Justice confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The fighting game based on the popular anime will arrive on Nintendo's next console.

summary: The psychological horror series will have a new television production, as revealed by Gematsu.

title: Dungeons & Dragons updates one of the worst subclasses of Ravenloft
summary: The new book corrects the cursed sorcerer to make it more viable and balanced.

summary: The release window for streaming and home formats of the new film has been revealed.

summary: The official sales begin in three days with significant discounts on games and consoles.
